note: in/out are SECONDS into the source file, already trimmed to the KEEPER take with small handles. orient L vs V is a RESOLUTION/camera-mode label, NOT an aspect difference: L files store as 3840x2160 + rotation flag -> bake to 2160x3840 portrait on trim; V files are native 1728x3072 portrait. BOTH ARE 9:16 PORTRAIT after trim, no reframe needed.

clips.line: Do you think a drug dealer could build a software company to $1M in a year?
clips.notes: HERO. Internal ~5s pause (4.8-9.7) mid-line -> tighten. whisper heard 'an ex drug dealer'. Only take.

clips.line: My name's Tanner, and I was convicted of trafficking marijuana.
clips.notes: Clean single take. Alt = 175 (3 takes). 'marijuana' to bleep/cut per script.

clips.line: And my name's Elijah. I've never been convicted because I've never done anything wrong.
clips.notes: 13s of setup silence before the line trimmed off. VERTICAL.

clips.line: And we've decided to disrupt the $200 billion a year industry.
clips.notes: Clean full take but SLOW/deliberate w/ big inter-word gaps -> tighten gaps. Alt = 179 (3 rushed takes).

clips.line: the editing industry.
clips.notes: Very short single take. Pairs w/ G3 slam card.

clips.line: Everybody wants to be a creator - influencer, streamer, YouTuber, TikToker.
clips.notes: Single take.

clips.line: So what do they do? They record everything, download CapCut, and dream of posting 3x a day with pro-level edits and going viral.
clips.notes: Cut the aborted 'they post it' false start (0-1.8). Keeper take 2.

clips.line: The reality is 99% of creators don't know how to edit.
clips.notes: Single take.

clips.line: So they spend months attempting to learn a skill that takes people years to not even master.
clips.notes: Keeper = take 2 (full). Take 1 (0-3.1) is shorter.

clips.line: Or settling and spending thousands a month for an editor.
clips.notes: Single take.

clips.line: Or they take the lazy route and find cheap templates that tank their quality and make their content look like everybody else's.
clips.notes: Single take.

clips.line: I myself was about to spend $2,500 a month because I post almost 200 videos a month. That's just short-form content.
clips.notes: Clean full take. Alt = 188 (aborted on throat-clear). Pairs w/ G5 stat pop.

clips.line: Not everyone has that budget, and not everyone has 100 hours to learn something.
clips.notes: Single take. NO Rode backup wav -> uses camera audio.

clips.line: And while you're stressing about editing, your creativity and motivation are rapidly declining.
clips.notes: Keeper = take 2 (full). Cut the 'you're stressing about editing,' false start (0-2.3).

clips.line: So we built the first fully agentic, prompt-to-edit model.
clips.notes: HERO (product reveal). Last of ~4 takes. Shots 15 ('so we built something to fix it') + 16 ('ClipWith.ai' name) were NOT shot as clean standalone takes -> see FLAG. Lean on G6 'Introducing ClipWith' card here.

clips.line: No more the days of navigating around a confusing menu that takes months to learn and years to even perfect.
clips.notes: Last clean take (earlier takes have profanity 'confusing as f***'). VERTICAL.

clips.line: ClipWith AI handles motion graphics, cuts, captions, SFX, and everything else you'd need. Literally just ask.
clips.notes: Last full take. VERTICAL. Pairs w/ G8 app-UI graphic.

clips.line: If you're not taking full advantage of social media because you don't have a good editor, the time, or the money - we've fully eliminated that excuse for everybody.
clips.notes: Clean take after a false 'If' start + 12s pause; take starts on 'you're not taking' (the 'If' at 0.3 is detached - grab it from 0.3 if you want it). VERTICAL.

clips.line: This video was actually edited by ClipWith AI - with a few simple prompts.
clips.notes: HERO (the meta flex). Single take. whisper heard 'props'='prompts'. Pairs w/ G9 reveal. VERTICAL.

clips.line: Make sure you follow - we're building in public and documenting every step. We launch at the end of the month. Over 1,000 creators are already on the free waitlist - join them at clipwith.ai.
clips.notes: HERO (CTA). Final clean run of MANY takes (earlier ones have bloopers/profanity). Covers shots 21+22+23 continuously. VERTICAL.

flags: RESOLUTION MIX (minor, NOT orientation): clips 1,2,4-15 = 2160x3840 (sharper); clips 3,16-20 = 1728x3072 (softer). All 9:16 portrait. Slight look shift at clip 16; colorkit develop evens it.
MISSING BEATS: no clean standalone take of 'So we built something to fix it' (shot 15) or the 'ClipWith.ai' name drop (shot 16). Folded into clip 15. Consider a VO pickup or rely on the G6 card.
177 = behind-the-scenes planning chatter, NOT a script line -> excluded.
Alternates kept untrimmed in source for your eye: 175 (Tanner intro), 179 (disrupt), 188 (2500/mo throat-clear).
